title: GST Services in Pune | Virtual Auditor

bodyText:
What is gst registration, filing & appeal services? GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit, show cause notice reply, and GST appeal representation.
GST Registration, Filing & Appeal Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Pune, Maharashtra since 2012.
Quick Answer: GST Services in Pune — GST registration, monthly/quarterly return filing, GST audit, show cause notice reply, and GST appea. From ₹2,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: GST Registration, Filing & Appeal Services in Pune
Virtual Auditor provides gst registration, filing & appeal services in Pune, Maharashtra. IT and automotive hub of Maharashtra. Our multi-credential practice (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) ensures comprehensive professional service delivery.
ROC jurisdiction: ROC Pune. Pincode: 411001.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• GST Registration (New/Amendment)
• Monthly GSTR-1 & GSTR-3B Filing
• Quarterly GSTR-4 (Composition)
• Annual GSTR-9/9C
• GST Audit
• Show Cause Notice Reply (DRC-01)
• GST Appeal (Section 107)

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: GST Registration
Apply via GST portal with PAN, Aadhaar, address proof
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Return Filing Setup
Configure filing frequency and HSN/SAC codes
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: Monthly Compliance
GSTR-1 by 11th, GSTR-3B by 20th of following month
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Annual Return
GSTR-9/9C by 31st December
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Appeal/Notice
Reply to SCN or file appeal within statutory deadlines

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: When turnover exceeds ₹40 lakhs (goods) or ₹20 lakhs (services). Also mandatory for e-commerce sellers, inter-state suppliers, and casual taxable persons.

faqs.q: What is the penalty for late GST filing?
faqs.a: ₹50/day (₹25 CGST + ₹25 SGST) for nil returns, ₹100/day for regular returns, subject to maximum of ₹5,000 per return.

faqs.q: Can you help with GST show cause notices?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle DRC-01 replies, Section 73/74 proceedings, and Section 107 appeals. AI-assisted order analysis within 24 hours.

faqs.q: Do you provide gst services in Pune?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Pune, Maharashtra. IT and automotive hub of Maharashtra. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Pune?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Pune clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with gst services in Pune?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Pune businesses with no location surcharges.
